# services.espanso

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.espanso`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| ---------------------------------- | ----------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `services.espanso.configs` | `YAML 1.1 value` | The Espanso configuration to use. See https://espanso.org/docs/configuration/basics/ for a description of available options. |
| `services.espanso.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Espanso: cross platform text expander in Rust. |
| `services.espanso.matches` | `YAML 1.1 value` | The Espanso matches to use. See https://espanso.org/docs/matches/basics/ for a description of available options. |
| `services.espanso.package` | `package` | The espanso package to use. |
| `services.espanso.package-wayland` | `null or package` | The espanso-wayland package to use. Which espanso package to use when running under wayland. |
| `services.espanso.settings` | | |
| `services.espanso.waylandSupport` | `boolean` | Whether to enable wayland support on linux |
| `services.espanso.x11Support` | `boolean` | Whether to enable x11 support on linux |
